payload.answer: The admin is permitted to execute SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 but is denied permission to execute DELETE FROM memory_cards under SQL select-only mode.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution required; all entities are explicitly defined in the policy statement.

memory_cards.statement: Admin SQL select-only mode permits SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10; DELETE FROM memory_cards is denied.

details: Policy evaluated: SELECT allowed, DELETE denied.
No memory cards were modified or deleted.
